patch.value: Torn-install bundle transients block scheduled releases: boot-time chunk-integrity self-check + distinct error code for gate classification

2026-07-12 scheduled Auto Release (run 29181568390) was blocked by the sentry-telemetry-gate on PM-CLI-26 (SyntaxError: chunk-IV4NIS5E.js missing export verifyHistoryChain, 1 event) and PM-CLI-10 (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND at module load, 6 events since 05-31). Both are torn-install/torn-build transients on the operator machine: dist/cli-bundle uses hashed esbuild chunks (chunk-XXXX.js), and chunk-IV4NIS5E exists in NO current build — main.js from one build generation resolved chunks from another during a concurrent upgrade/rebuild. Generic 'cannot find module' patterns CANNOT be added to KNOWN_EXPECTED_HANDLED_ENVIRONMENT_ISSUE_PATTERNS (scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs) because real shipped regressions (e.g. the CJS-host DOA P0) present identically. Class fix: (1) emit a build-generation manifest (chunk names + hash) into dist/cli-bundle at build time; (2) at CLI boot, on module-resolution failure inside the bundle, compare manifest vs on-disk chunks and re-raise as a distinct handled error code (e.g. bundle_integrity_torn_install) with a friendly 'partial upgrade detected — reinstall' hint; (3) allowlist ONLY that distinct code in the gate's environment classification; (4) leave genuine module errors blocking. GH-521 is the auto-filed ops alert for the blocked run.

Build emits a chunk manifest; boot-time resolution failures inside dist/cli-bundle are re-raised as a distinct handled bundle-integrity error code with reinstall hint; sentry-telemetry-gate classifies only that code as expected-handled environment noise; regression test proves a genuine missing-module error still blocks the gate; docs note the torn-install signature

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Live reliability evidence 2026-07-12: PM-CLI-10 remains the second 14-day Sentry gate blocker; latest event is handled=true ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND from the operator host on release 2026.7.12 and matches this item's torn-install signature. Current build/packed-consumer and 10k/100k performance dogfood do not reproduce it. Resolving the already-triaged event group pending this item's distinct bundle-integrity code fix; genuine module failures remain blocking by design.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Live recurrence 2026-07-12 17:27Z: PM-CLI-26 count is now 2. Latest handled production event on release pm-cli@2026.7.12 reports stale chunk-BVCWZQR4.js missing createStdinTokenResolver; the earlier event used a different stale chunk/export. This strengthens the canonical torn-generation diagnosis and acceptance criteria; no duplicate item created. Current build, full 5588-test coverage, installed-package dogfood, and strict 10k benchmark do not reproduce it. Resolving the observed group pending the distinct bundle-integrity code implementation; genuine module failures remain gate-blocking.
